description_long: This is a round, twisted loaf of bread with a toroidal shape, resembling a large ring or braided bread. The crust is golden brown and generously sprinkled with a mix of white and black sesame seeds, giving it a visually appealing, textured surface. The bread's surface shows distinct, deep scoring or twisting lines, which create a segmented appearance around the ring. The interior, visible at some of the scored sections, appears soft and airy, contrasting with the firmer, glossy crust. The bread is unsliced and has a rustic, artisanal look, typical of breads found in urban bakeries or street markets. There is no visible branding, packaging, or labeling on the bread.
description: A round, twisted loaf of bread with a golden brown, seed-covered crust and a soft, airy interior. The bread has a segmented, braided appearance and is unsliced.
description_view_0: This view highlights the twisted, ring shape and the dense scattering of sesame seeds on the golden brown crust, with deep scoring lines visible.
description_view_1: The bread's airy interior is more visible in this view, showing the contrast between the soft inside and the glossy, seed-covered crust.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the segmented, braided pattern and the even distribution of seeds, with a clear view of the bread's thickness.
description_view_3: The rounded, continuous ring shape is most apparent here, with the crust's texture and seed coverage clearly visible.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features a twisted, braided pattern with deep scoring lines and is generously sprinkled with white and black sesame seeds. The surface is glossy in places and has a rustic, artisanal texture.
